'''shajuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:grades|grades]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:grades|grades]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shajuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæjihith|shæjihith]] || [[word:shæjihij|shæjihij]] || [[word:shæjihish|shæjihish]] || [[word:shæjihi|shæjihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shajujuhuth|shajujuhuth]] || [[word:shajujuhuj|shajujuhuj]] || [[word:shajujuhush|shajujuhush]] || [[word:shajujuhu|shajujuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shajuhuth|shajuhuth]] || [[word:shajuhuj|shajuhuj]] || [[word:shajuhush|shajuhush]] || [[word:shajuhu|shajuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shajufhuth|shajufhuth]] || [[word:shajufhuj|shajufhuj]] || [[word:shajufhush|shajufhush]] || [[word:shajufhuf|shajufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shajuhuthu|shajuhuthu]] || [[word:shajuhuju|shajuhuju]] || [[word:shajuhushu|shajuhushu]] || [[word:shajuhuku|shajuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shajuhuth|shajuhuth]] || [[word:shajuhuj|shajuhuj]] || [[word:shajuhush|shajuhush]] || [[word:shajuhu|shajuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shajuhuthul|shajuhuthul]] || [[word:shajuhujul|shajuhujul]] || [[word:shajuhushul|shajuhushul]] || [[word:shajuhukul|shajuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shajuhuthuthu|shajuhuthuthu]] || [[word:shajuhujuju|shajuhujuju]] || [[word:shajuhushushu|shajuhushushu]] || [[word:shajuhuku|shajuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shajuhuthun|shajuhuthun]] || [[word:shajuhujun|shajuhujun]] || [[word:shajuhushun|shajuhushun]] || [[word:shajuhukun|shajuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shajuhuthuoro|shajuhuthuoro]] || [[word:shajuhujuoro|shajuhujuoro]] || [[word:shajuhushuoro|shajuhushuoro]] || [[word:shajuhukuoro|shajuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
